etymology.description: иҮЈ(иҮЈ) (chГ©n, "minister") + phonetic: иіў(иіў) (xiГЎn, "worthy") = represents an ancient form with phonetic value from иіў -> strong
etymology.interpretation: The character иҮӨ(xiГЎn, "strong") is an ancient form derived from иіў(иіў) (xiГЎn, "worthy"), with иҮЈ(иҮЈ) (chГ©n, "minister") serving as the semantic component, indicating a quality associated with strength or virtue.
